text: Skeletal editing is a term that was introduced to describe that it is possible to carry out changes at the atom level to the molecular skeleton. This review provides a comprehensive overview of the developments in the field of single atom insertions, deletions and transmutations mainly in the context of (hetero)cyclic systems.
explanation: The sentence uses clean, domain-specific phrasing typical of scientific abstracts; there’s no obvious AI hallmark, but such concise wording could be AI-generated as well.
